friction_stack_alerts.name: Onboarding pipeline — 6-stage manual gauntlet
friction_stack_alerts.description: Every venue passes through 6 manual stages: form data to HubSpot to Hub to menu digitisation to hours reconciliation to map pin. Multiple failure points before first transaction. Affects all ~400 venues/month.
friction_stack_alerts.recommended_action: Flag to Luke Maurel. Prioritise OPP-001 as first unlock.
friction_stack_alerts.source: Karen walkthrough Mar 31 + Adam Product Trio Weekly Apr 1

friction_stack_alerts.name: IAO (online ordering) venues — high-churn segment
friction_stack_alerts.description: Jeroen analysis: IAO churn rate is 2x dine-in churn. Indian restaurants and pizza shops churn 22% higher. These groups likely overlap and may be silently stacking friction without raising support tickets.
friction_stack_alerts.recommended_action: Flag to Luke Maurel. Commission targeted audit of IAO venue health metrics before end of April.

churn_signals.signal: Indian restaurants and pizza shops churn 22% higher than average
Slow go-live from manual onboarding delays first transaction, increasing pre-activation churn risk
